name: Wight Reanimator
desc: If your "King of the Skull Servants" attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Skull Servant" or "King of the Skull Servants" in your GY; send 1 "Skull Servant" or 1 monster that mentions it from your Deck to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon the targeted monster, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Zombie monsters.
eff: If your "King of the Skull Servants" attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Skull Servant" or "King of the Skull Servants" in your GY; send 1 "Skull Servant" or 1 monster that mentions it from your Deck to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon the targeted monster, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Zombie monsters.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
